chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA C.P.No.S-171 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections at flag "A". 2. For hearing of main case. ------ 15.09.2025 Petitioner is present in person. Mr. Munwar Ali Abbasi, Assistant Advocate General, Sindh. Mr. Sardar Ali, Deputy Prosecutor General, Sindh a/w SIP Khalid Hussain and DSP Shokat Ali Rind. ------ Through this petition, the petitioner has prayed as under: a. That this Honourable Court may kindly be pleased to direct the respondent No.5 to provide protection to the petitioner and his family members. b. To direct the respondents No.7 & 8 not to cause any sort of harassment to petitioner and his family members. c. To direct the respondents N.7 & 8 to appear before this Honourable Court and this Honourable Court may kindly be pleased to execute their PR Bond for not causing any harassment to the petitioner and his family members. d. To grant any other alternate relief which this Honourable Court deems fit and proper in the circumstances of the case. Pursuant to notice, the official respondents filed their respective Statements, stating therein that they neither have caused any harassment to the petitioner nor intend to do so in future; however, the matter is purely of civil nature. The petitioner, present in person, being satisfied with the statements of the official respondents, seeks disposal of instant petition, which is accordingly disposed of. However, the official respondents are directed to act strictly in accordance with law and shall not cause harassment to the petitioner. Judge Manzoor
